answers: Karaoke is a form of entertainment where people sing along to pre-recorded music with lyrics displayed on screen. It originated in Japan in the 1970s and is now enjoyed worldwide.
Karaoke holo gaan er music baje but vocal tumi nijer deo — screen e lyrics dekhai. Japan e shuru hoyechilo. Friends er shathe karaoke night onek fun!
Popular karaoke apps include Smule, Starmaker, and Yokee. For home karaoke, you need a microphone (even a phone works) and a karaoke app or YouTube karaoke tracks.
Karaoke tips: choose songs you know well, don't worry about being perfect, engage with the audience, warm up your voice first, and start with crowd-pleasers like Bohemian Rhapsody or summer hits.
